8001.name: Warden Kael
8001.description: A grizzled veteran with scars from a dozen realms. His eyes are sharp despite his age. He trains newcomers in the basics of combat.

dialogue.greet: Another traveler from beyond the veil. You'll need to learn to fight if you want to survive out there. The dummies are free to use.

8002.name: Merchant Zara
8002.description: A sharp-eyed woman in mismatched clothing from half a dozen realms. She runs the Bazaar with an iron fist and a silver tongue.

dialogue.greet: Buying or selling? I deal in goods from every realm. Check the board for player listings.

8003.name: Old Merchant Giles
8003.description: A stooped old man with kind eyes and ink-stained fingers. He sells basic supplies and knows every rumor in Thornhold.

dialogue.greet: Welcome, traveler. Need supplies? I've got potions, torches, and rope. Also heard something strange rolled through the market last night — left a groove in the cobblestones.

1001.name: Highwayman
1001.description: A ragged figure in a torn cloak, wielding a rusty shortsword. He blocks the road with false bravado.

1002.name: Hollow Wolf
1002.description: A gaunt wolf with glowing green eyes. Its ribs are visible through matted fur. It snarls at your approach.

1003.name: Goblin Squatter
1003.description: A small green creature crouched over a cooking pot. It hisses when it sees you, reaching for a crude knife.

1004.name: Shadow Stalker
1004.description: A creature of pure darkness that moves between the trees. Its form is indistinct — just a deeper shadow among shadows.

1005.name: Giant Spider
1005.description: A spider the size of a large dog. Its mandibles drip with venom and its eight eyes reflect your terrified face back at you.
